title.purpose: Card titles, panel headers, significant lists.

body.purpose: Core reading text. Default for prose.

label.purpose: Muted text, badges, chip labels, map overlays.

shadows.name: card-ambient-light
shadows.purpose: Ambient elevation for cards and floating panels in light mode.

shadows.name: card-ambient-dark
shadows.purpose: Ambient elevation for cards and floating panels in dark mode.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default state transition easing. Short duration.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Flat by default, darker on hover/focus.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2563EB; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 18px 48px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.1px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1D4ED8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset: 12px; border-radius: 12px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #1D4ED8; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Destructive action variant. Uses Error Coral.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background: #EF4444; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 18px 48px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.1px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: #DC2626; } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #EF4444; outline-offset: 12px; border-radius: 12px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Filled text field with search styling and focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #F1F5F9; color: #1E293B; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; font-size: 13px; font-family: inherit; box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border: 1.5px solid #2563EB; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94A3B8; } .ds-input:disabled { color: #94A3B8; opacity: 1; }

components.name: Chip Default
components.description: Filter chip default state with border.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1E293B; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 20px; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.2px; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; }

components.name: Chip Selected
components.css: .ds-chip-selected { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #2563EB; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #2563EB; border-radius: 20px; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.2px; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; }

components.name: Card
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; } .ds-card-body { color: #1E293B; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Snackbar
components.css: .ds-snackbar { position: fixed; bottom: 16px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: #1E293B; color: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 18px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); z-index: 50; font-family: inherit; } .ds-snackbar-body { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; }

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal dialog for confirmations and forms.
components.css: .ds-dialog { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); max-width: 520px; width: calc(100% - 48px); box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; } .ds-dialog-body { color: #1E293B; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.4; }

narrative.overview: A calm, high-contrast data environment that feels like a precision instrument for field operations. Light surfaces carry soft blue-grey papers; dark surfaces sink into deep slate. The system is built for long working sessions, dense tables, and rapid map navigation. The palette is restrained: one primary blue, one cyan secondary, one violet accent, and smart neutrals. Gradients are used sparingly to mark rank and status, not decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Clear surface layering through subtle borders and soft backgrounds
Primary actions use Ocean Blue; secondary telemetry uses Cyan; attention-directing highlights use Violet
Reduced motion by default; transitions are pure state changes
Typography is tight, technical, and unambiguous

rules.name: Rare Accent Rule
rules.body: Primary Ocean Blue appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Cyan and Violet are even rarer. Their rarity is the point — when the user sees blue, something is actionable.

rules.name: Dark Surface Rule
rules.body: Dark mode is not simply inverted light mode. Dark surfaces carry reduced saturation so highlights remain punchy. Never paste a light-mode value into dark mode; always derive from the neutral stack with adjusted luminance.

rules.name: Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No card has a shadow unless it is modal, elevated, or in focus. Default panels are separated via border on surface-muted backgrounds. Shadows appear only as response to state — hover, focus, or modal elevation.

rules.name: Vietnamese Clarity Rule
rules.body: All text sizes maintain a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against their background under both light and dark themes.

dos: Do reserve Ocean Blue (#2563EB) for actions, selections, and focus. When in doubt, ask whether the element moves the task forward.
Do keep cards on the neutral surface stack. A card that needs emphasis should grow in size or weight, not in decoration.
Do use the six-level text hierarchy exactly. Do not invent ad-hoc font sizes between levels.
Do keep rank gradients semantic. Primary gradient for number 1, green for positive, orange for warning, never for decoration.
Do verify 4.5:1 contrast for all text under WCAG AA, including caption sizes on both light and dark themes.
Do use system font stacks so Vietnamese diacritical marks render crisply on all desktop platforms.
donts: Don't use decorative gradients, patterned backgrounds, glassmorphism, or noise textures. The surface is flat; depth comes from structure, not materiality.
Don't place heavy marketing-style illustrations, hero images, or narrative scroll sections. This is an operational instrument — data density is the brand.
Don't introduce additional accent colors beyond the defined trio. If a new color seems necessary, reconsider whether an existing token can carry the meaning.
Don't use shadows by default. A shadow on every card is visual noise; reserve them for modal, active, or focus states only.
Don't break the Surface / Surface Muted / Border stack. If a container feels flat, increase its border contrast or shift its surface token; never add a gradient to a passive element.
Don't rely on color alone for status. Pair every color-coded indicator with text or icon affordance for color-blind users.
